description:
You are an Environmental Restoration Planner assessing the computational mesh of a HEC-RAS 2D hydraulic model of the White River through Muncie, Indiana. Document the existing mesh properties from the HDF file located at /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_projects/Muncie/Muncie.p04.tmp.hdf.

Produce a text report at /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/mesh_analysis_report.txt containing:
- Total number of 2D computational cells across all flow areas
- Number of 2D flow areas and their names
- For each 2D flow area: cell count, minimum, maximum, mean, and standard deviation of cell elevations, spatial extents (min X, max X, min Y, max Y), and domain width and height.

Produce a CSV file at /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/mesh_cell_data.csv with columns: area_name, cell_index, center_x, center_y, min_elevation (one row per computational cell).
